title: TheRewards
description: Plugin to manage streaks and daily rewards.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20bbff0d477117e5714ea1b63710cb082febd31f.png)


**With this plugin, players can claim daily / weekly / monthly rewards or any other you can think of, and are forget about the streak of connections. Moreover, the plugin is easy to install and customize according to server preferences: dare to challenge your players with this exciting plugin!**


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f4680f40dfd403205fc12bd5d763f64ce72323.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13af011bb36f5e1d7b8f059f852e49d3b8f8c230.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aeb66b5c23bf1164993d8379e2c3239fa072a23.png)

[https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/TheRewards.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/TheRewards.svg)

- Possibility to change the base commands
- Use MySQL or SQLite storage
- Infinite Rewards
- Actions and Requirements
- Multiple designs
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Support with Hexadecimal Colors.
- Custom Model Data Support
- Creation of customized items
- Page system in the menu
- 5 Menu designs in the wiki
- Folia support


**PlaceholderAPI**:
Type: Soft Dependency
Description: Adds custom placeholders to PAPI. Allows placeholders to be used in the rewards.

**Layouts**:
We offer 5 default designs, which you can use and configure to your liking.
